If he had pursued a career in sales rather than accounting his salary would be much lower. It it hadn't been for his auntie's referral his career wouldn't take off now and he wouldn't start earning a lot of money. He's been having a crush on this girl named.Joyce for eight years but Joyce has a boyfriend. His friend said "that's totally fair. She's quite attractive" But he's beginning to realise he has no place in her scheme of things. He's just being a doormat so I told him to forget her. She's just not worth it. His dad said "you'll be better off without her" His uncle too said "you would be better off without her" He's a sci-fi fan. He said "if starships would exist I'd quit my job and spend the rest of my life roaming the universe" Last summer his sister married her childhood sweetheart. Her mother felt she was marrying beneath her though. Her uncle feels her husband is beneath her too. She enjoys socializing with the better off. Three weeks ago he was away on a business trip to Hokkaido. After his trip I said "if you should travel there again can you get me a pack of white lover cookies please?" He's a computer expert. His cousin has to wrote a report which is due on Tuesday but she's having problems worry her computer. If paul will go and fi max her computer she'll be so thankful for his help. She also has exams next Monday so she better off revising at home over the weekend. Paul is a kickboxing fan. His favourite fighter Dan has recently won his retirement fight. He's eternally grateful to his coaches and thankful that he's got a job as a colour commentator after he retired from the sport. All the fans wanna see Fred versus randy. If Fred would sign a deal with the organisation Dana will make the fight happen. When randy was reading the terms and conditions of the contract dana's assistant said "if you would just sign here please" By the end of next century scientists will have invented starships. As I'm extremely interested in the science of starships I'm gonna ask physicist professor.Chan about it. I'm gonna wait for him outside the lecture room at twenty five to six. He won't have finished his lecture yet" It's true that he wouldn't have finished teaching yet. Last week paul gave a party. As many of us wanted to watch the news I said "if I could turn the tv on please" He said "sure. If you would switch to the news" Paul's brother is a concierge in a hotel. I said "if it will make you happy I'll come to stay for a night as company for you while your colleagues are away" I saw joey live twice at the hong kong Coliseum with my friends which was absolutely incredible and unforgettable. It was a worthwhile concert that was compelling enough to see again. I remember we were late. i said "look at the time. The concert will have begun" It was twenty five past eight. The concert would've started by then.
